templates.structure: Five sentences. Opens with a compressed time-lapse journey, expands through increasingly detailed scenery, then snaps to an emotional payoff in the final short sentence.
rhetorical-dna: Time-compression opener collapses hours/days/weeks into a single clause, then gradually slows to real-time arrival
Landscape/architecture accumulation through triadic and list structures
Simile drawn from the natural/animal world grounding the epic in bodily familiarity
Register is formal-archaic, dignified, with emotional restraint until the final sentence breaks into open feeling
Final sentence pivots from place to person, rewarding the long scenic build-up with sudden human recognition
templates.respecification-seed: A long journey ends with the unexpected discovery of an ally.

templates.structure: Five sentences. Opens with a short physical anchor, expands into a long sensory panorama across three layered middle sentences, then closes with denial and concealment.
rhetorical-dna: Sharp physical anchor followed by expansive dreamlike survey
Systematic depth layering: immediate edge, middle distance, far distance, hidden ultimate distance
Contrast between sensory abundance and final withholding
Register is elevated, wondering, deliberately gorgeous; the paragraph breathes outward then closes like a curtain
templates.respecification-seed: Travelers gaze from a harsh threshold into a lush hidden scene whose ultimate secrets remain veiled.

templates.structure: Seven sentences. Opens with a one-line metaphorical verdict, follows with a blunt short sentence, then unfurls four increasingly elaborate sentences of setting-inventory, and closes with a rhythmic catalog of supernatural disturbances.
rhetorical-dna: Opening metaphor frames the entire space as a death-chamber, coloring everything that follows with funereal beauty
Scene described through inversion of former splendor: each detail names what the thing once was before stating its decay
Extended simile yokes physical decay to aristocratic death
Shift from visual ruin to temporal endurance normalizes the uncanny before escalating into supernatural catalog
Final sentence uses asyndeton and rhythmic piling to accumulate dread without resolution
templates.respecification-seed: A company shelters in a once-beautiful setting now haunted by decay and restless supernatural presences.
